basic_details.job_title: PGIMER Junior Demonstrator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education & Research (PGIMER)
basic_details.short_information: The Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education & Research (PGIMER) has officially announced the Junior Demonstrator (Epidemiology) Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification has been published on the official PGIMER website. Candidates up to 45 years of age holding an M.Sc. in Epidemiology or a Master of Public Health (MPH) can submit their applications through email on or before 21 July 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and application details are shared below.

salary_details.details: As per PGIMER rules and regulations

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for PGIMER Junior Demonstrator (Epidemiology) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 21-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download PGIMER Junior Demonstrator Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download PGIMER Junior Demonstrator Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: PGIMER Junior Demonstrator Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the PGIMER Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download PGIMER Junior Demonstrator Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: As per PGIMER rules and regulations

content_sections.heading: PGIMER Junior Demonstrator Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for PGIMER Junior Demonstrator (Epidemiology) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 21-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: PGIMER Junior Demonstrator Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the PGIMER Junior Demonstrator (Epidemiology) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 21st July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the qualification required for the Junior Demonstrator post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MSc in Epidemiology or a Master of Public Health (MPH) degree to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Junior Demonstrator (Epidemiology) post is 45 years.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Junior Demonstrator post?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment will be based on an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the type of job being offered?
faq.answer: The position of Junior Demonstrator (Epidemiology) is an ad-hoc appointment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Junior Demonstrator (Epidemiology) announced in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the interview for the Junior Demonstrator post scheduled?
faq.answer: The interview for the Junior Demonstrator (Epidemiology) post is scheduled to be held on 23rd July 2026.

faq.question: Q9. What is the salary for the Junior Demonstrator position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Junior Demonstrator post will be as per the rules and regulations of PGIMER.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates apply offline for this position?
faq.answer: No, the application mode for this recruitment is strictly via email. Offline applications will not be considered.
